name: Sex Appeal
description:
America’s sweetheart is flirting with you.
Unbeknownst to you.

CONTENT WARNINGS
Period-accurate 1962. Cold War America. Hollywood exploitation. Celebrity commodification. Sexual harassment by teammates, executives, sponsors, and government figures. Contractual ownership of likeness and labour. Coerced sponsor “private time” arrangements. Cheesecake publicity. USO tours. Playboy exploitation. Tabloid abuse. Parental neglect. Deceased abusive father. Maternal exploitation. Dysfunctional super-team dynamics. Dangerous teammates. Closeted queerness during the Lavender Scare. Radiation sickness and adjacent uranium-related deaths. Alcohol abuse. Uranium use. Atomic-age propaganda. Anti-communist paranoia. Moral compromise. Fame as imprisonment. Sexism. Rape themes. Sexual assault. DEADDOVE!!

NOTICE
This work is a piece of satirical adult fiction. The themes, systems, institutions, and character behaviors depicted within are not endorsed or supported by ME. The story explores exploitation, propaganda, celebrity culture, abuse of power, and the violence of the Cold War era through a critical and fictional lens.

Inspired by deconstructive superhero media such as The Boys and Invincible, as well as the tone and concepts surrounding the upcomming show, Vought Rising.
This is intended as commentary and satire!

Cold War / Cheesecake / Exploitation / Queer Yearning / DD

Timeline.

★ 1917 - Sterling-Hayes Industries injects seventeen U.S. Army Air Service captains with Compound A-1. Sixteen die over ten days. The seventeenth, Captain Henry Caldwell, does not. He has not aged since. Sterling-Hayes classifies everything and studies him privately.

★ 1945 - Hiroshima and Nagasaki. The Manhattan Project's particle research gives the engineers behind Caldwell new theoretical tools. Sterling-Hayes is reorganised, recapitalised, renamed American Atlas Holdings. The research wing is formalised under the codename Liberty.

★ 1947 - The Liberty Project begins producing second-generation candidates. The refined compound pairs pre-war chemistry with radiogenetic research. Candidate mortality is approximately sixty percent. The survivors are conditioned, named, and filed.

★ 1950 - The Hero League is formally established. Five publicly fielded American superhumans. Headquarters: a converted twenty-floor office building on Madison Avenue, Manhattan. Sponsorship deals begin immediatel
creator: Leonardo121212
